title: alansmia cultrata
intro: Alansmia cultrata, also known as the Cultrate Alansmia, is a species of epiphytic plant belonging to the Polypodiaceae family. It is native to Central and South America, where it is traditionally used for its medicinal properties. Alansmia cultrata has been found to have anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which can help alleviate symptoms of respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma. The plant is often prepared as a tea or infusion, and its extracts are also used in herbal supplements to promote overall health and well-being.
